feature: Client Management CRUD with PacoTicket Integration

tasks.subject: Create PacoTicketApiService
tasks.description: Implement PacoTicketApiService.php with createCompany() and updateCompany() using curl. Tolerant to failure per FR-004.
tasks.evidence: Created PacoTicketApiService.php with createCompany() and updateCompany() using curl, returns null on failure

tasks.subject: Create ClientController with index and show
tasks.description: Implement ClientController.php with index() (FR-001 role-based) and show() (FR-008 with joins).
tasks.evidence: Created ClientController.php with index() role-based + filters, show() with plan/addons/commissionRule joins

tasks.subject: Implement client store with CommissionRule
tasks.description: Add store() to ClientController: validate plan (FR-009), create Client with JWT partnerId (FR-002), create CommissionRule with tier (FR-003), call PacoTicket (FR-004).
tasks.evidence: Added store() with plan validation, Client+CommissionRule transaction, PacoTicket try/catch

tasks.subject: Implement client update with PacoTicket mirror
tasks.description: Add update() to ClientController: update contact info (FR-005), mirror to PacoTicket if pacoticketId exists (FR-006).
tasks.evidence: Added update() with contact fields + PacoTicket mirror if pacoticketId exists

tasks.subject: Implement client soft-delete
tasks.description: Add destroy() to ClientController: soft-delete setting status=INACTIVE (FR-007). SuperAdmin only.

tasks.subject: Implement ClientAddon CRUD methods
tasks.description: Add indexAddons(), storeAddon(), updateAddon(), destroyAddon() to ClientController per FR-010.
tasks.evidence: Added indexAddons, storeAddon, updateAddon, destroyAddon with ownership checks

tasks.subject: Register client routes in index.php
tasks.description: Add 9 client routes to backend/public/index.php with auth/superadmin middleware.
